## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not include API keys, tokens, cookies, passwords, private files, or paid source documents.
- [ ] I did not commit generated `output/` folders.
- [ ] I did not add hidden network calls or install scripts.
- [ ] I checked licenses for any new dependencies or copied material.
- [ ] I preserved original-source evidence instead of overwriting it.
